title: Pugetia pulverulenta
taxonomy: Pugetia pulverulenta is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to Western Australia. The plant is also known as the dusty currant or dusty currant bush. The classification of Pugetia pulverulenta is as a species within the genus Pugetia, which is part of the buckthorn family. Further classification of the plant includes its family, order, and class, placing it within the larger angiosperm category.
